packages.name: wallet-bridge
packages.description: Chat-to-wallet bridge: delegated spend lanes (immutable SpendRouter contract base + gasless permit-lane keeper swarm object) plus generic wallet-order transport (user_tx/bind) behind one attested wallet dapp and launcher
packages.note: module is the keeper's swarm-object door (async registration, framework-stamped source identity); the intake HTTP path stays a synchronous call into the same core. Contracts (Foundry) and the wallet dapp travel in-repo; consumers deploy their own SpendRouter subclass — no shared deployed contracts.
